failure: Start Aptenra showed ProgramData logs access-denied dialog under non-elevated desktop session.
cause: Ensure-UserWritableShellState / icacls failed with ErrorActionPreference Stop; LocalService-owned ProgramData tree not fully writable by interactive user.
lesson: Never hard-fail launcher on ACL grant. Best-effort grant; fall back Electron profile and companion trace to LocalAppData; keep Host IPC on service state. Capture dialog on KVM and launcher jsonl on remote.

failure: Second Start Aptenra click felt stuck ~90s then failed.
cause: Second Electron exited early (singleton/profile lock) while launcher waited full StartupTimeout for startup.ready.
lesson: Abort wait when shell process has exited; detect existing shell more robustly; prefer activate path over second full start.

failure: PiKVM HID print mangled long Run-dialog PowerShell paths.
cause: Long or sequential hid/print streams drop or reorder characters on this control path.
lesson: Use short commands only on KVM; transfer scripts via remote/scp; never rely on HID for multi-line installs.

failure: Launcher treated Host unhealthy while Windows service Host was running.
cause: Probed user debug host state instead of ProgramData service host; status needs_help not accepted.
lesson: Prefer AptenraHost service when endpoint healthy; accept needs_help as reachable for companion launch.

failure: Mother commits present locally but HP worktree stayed on older SHA.
cause: Push to hp-test bare was not run after new commits; worktree not reset after bare update.
lesson: After mother commits: push both main and device branch; on HP fetch and hard-align; refresh Launch-Aptenra.ps1; verify HEAD equality.

failure: Risk of losing HP local edits on hard reset.
cause: Target worktree had porcelain dirty files before sync.
lesson: Always stash -u with dated message before reset --hard; record stash ref in evidence.

failure: Complex remote PowerShell one-liners returned empty output with exit 0.
cause: SSH + nested quoting/encoding on Windows OpenSSH cmd default shell.
lesson: SCP a .ps1 to evidence and execute -File; keep remote one-liners trivial.

failure: No HDMI signal / 0x0 capture while host may still be powered.
cause: Loose HDMI or laptop not outputting; PiKVM cannot press physical power.
lesson: Classify no_video vs offline; use remote_only diagnostics if shell works; escalate physical reseat/power to human.

failure: Framing dual-channel only as Personal product rescue under-scoped the capability.
cause: Early design language tied support plane to Personal SKU.
lesson: Treat dual-channel as LAN/VPN-adjacent onsite service for any single-device tier; not Personal-only; not public-internet always-on rescue.
